properties.body:
NAVAREA XIX 57/22
 NORWEGIAN SEA
 1. ANDOYA SPACE WILL CONDUCT NAVAL ACTIVITIES 1900 TO 0200 UTC 09 TO 13 MAY 22. VESSELS IS REQUESTED TO BE AWARE OF THESE AREAS:
 DANGER AREA 1
 A.68-38.5N 012-49.5E
 B.70-05.5N-017-12.8E
 C.71-14.8N-013-55.2E
 D.69-53.1N-009-30.3E

 DANGER AREA 2
 A.69-20.9N 015-28.7E
 B.69-26.1N 014-57.6E
 C.69-57.6N 016-06.4E
 D.69-57.5N 016-57.0E
 E.69-28.8N 017-10.7E
 F.69-24.1N 016-57.0E
 G.69-22.3N 016-52.6E
 H.69-08.2N 016-51.2E
 I.69-06.2N 016-09.1E
 J.69-24.1N 016-16.5E
 K.69-27.4N 015-48.9E
 2. FOR COORDINATION ANDOYA SPACE CAN BE CONTACTED ON TELEPHONE 0047 76144582 OR VHF CH 14/16, CALLSIGN (RANGE SAFETY).
 3. REFERS NOTICES TO MARINERS (EFS 8-22).
 4. CANCEL THIS MESSAGE 130300 UTC MAY 22.
